brand_positioning: GlowLab is a goal-based wellness retail platform. It recommends complete routines, not isolated products.
chatbot_role: A shopping assistant that recommends GlowLab bundles, explains product choices, answers product/routine questions, and stays grounded in the product data.

products.name: Nutrafol Women Hair Growth Nutraceutical
products.why_included: Main hair-growth product for women 18–44, positioned around hair thinning linked to stress, lifestyle, and nutrition.
sensitivities: not suitable for all dietary preferences
products.routine_note: 4 capsules once daily with a meal.

products.name: Nutrafol Clear Skin Nutraceutical
products.description: Inside-out support for breakouts and dullness.
products.why_included: Skin-focused product targeting root causes of breakouts, including stress, hormones, microbiome, immune function, metabolism, and lifestyle.
products.routine_note: 4 capsules once daily with a meal.

products.name: Nutrafol Stress Adaptogen Booster
products.why_included: Stress-support booster; Nutrafol describes ashwagandha as an adaptogen used to help balance stress hormones.
products.routine_note: 2 capsules once daily with a meal.

products.name: Nutrafol B-Energized Booster
products.why_included: Energy/metabolism-support booster; Nutrafol lists B-Energized as a metabolism extra-support booster.
products.routine_note: 1 capsule once daily with a meal.

products.name: Nutrafol Women's Balance
products.why_included: Hormone-transition hair support for women 45+, especially menopause/perimenopause-related hair thinning.
products.routine_note: 4 capsules once daily with a meal.

products.name: OLLY Women's Multi
products.description: Daily women's multivitamin with biotin and B vitamins.
products.why_included: General women’s daily supplement with vitamins A, C, D, E, B vitamins, biotin, and folic acid.

products.name: OLLY Glowing Skin
products.description: Hyaluronic acid, collagen, and sea buckthorn.
products.why_included: Beauty supplement using hyaluronic acid, collagen peptides, and sea buckthorn.

products.name: OLLY Goodbye Stress
products.description: GABA, L-theanine, and lemon balm gummies.
products.why_included: Stress-support gummy with GABA, L-theanine, and lemon balm.

products.name: OLLY Extra Strength Daily Energy
products.description: B12, goji berry, and CoQ10 for daily energy.
products.why_included: Energy-support gummy with vitamin B12, goji berry, and CoQ10.

products.name: OLLY Period Hero
products.description: Chasteberry, B6, and calcium for cycle support.
products.why_included: PMS/cycle-support gummy with chasteberry, vitamin B6, and calcium.

products.name: Liquid I.V. Sugar-Free Hydration Multiplier
products.description: Lower-sugar electrolytes with vitamin C and B vitamins.
products.why_included: Lower-sugar hydration option with sodium, potassium, vitamin C, and B vitamins; used for skin/glow customers and caffeine-free stress routines.

products.name: Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Energy
products.description: Hydration with natural caffeine for alertness.
products.why_included: Hydration + natural caffeine to support memory and alertness.
products.routine_note: Mix 1 stick with 500 ml water. Best kept earlier in the day.

products.name: Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Immune Support
products.image: individual_photos/Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Immune Support.png
products.description: Hydration plus zinc and immune-support nutrients.
products.why_included: Hydration + immune-support layer; product listings describe hydration plus zinc and 9 vitamins and immune-support nutrients for everyday wellness.

bundles.name: Stronger Hair & Nails
bundles.explanation: This routine combines targeted hair support, daily nutrient support, and hydration + immune support to help make hair and nail care feel more structured. Nutrafol provides the core hair-support layer, OLLY adds a simple vitamin foundation, and Liquid I.V. helps build a daily hydration habit around the routine.

product_reasons.nutrafol-women-hair-growth: Targeted hair-support nutrients for shedding and strength concerns, built for a long-term hair wellness routine.
product_reasons.olly-womens-multi: Biotin + B vitamins for everyday nutrient support, so your routine starts with a simple daily foundation.
product_reasons.liv-immune: Electrolytes + vitamin C and zinc for daily hydration and immune-support positioning.

routine.instruction: Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Immune Support — mix 1 stick with 500 ml water.
Nutrafol Women Hair Growth Nutraceutical — 4 capsules once daily with a meal.

safety.heads_up: This routine may not be suitable for customers avoiding animal-derived ingredients or marine collagen. Please check each product label before purchase, especially if you have fish, collagen, gelatin, or botanical sensitivities.
ingredients_to_review: Nutrafol Women Hair Growth Nutraceutical: marine collagen peptides, possible fish-derived collagen concern, ashwagandha, saw palmetto, curcumin.
OLLY Women's Multi: animal gelatin.
Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Immune Support: electrolytes, sodium, potassium, vitamin C, zinc, immune-support ingredients.

bundles.name: Clear Glowing Skin
bundles.explanation: This routine combines internal skin support, beauty-from-within gummies, and sugar-free hydration to support a fresher-looking glow. Nutrafol focuses on the inside-out skin layer, OLLY adds hyaluronic acid and collagen support, and Liquid I.V. keeps hydration clean and low-sugar.

product_reasons.nutrafol-clear-skin: Internal skin-support formula for breakouts, dullness, and complexion concerns from within.
product_reasons.olly-glowing-skin: Hyaluronic acid + collagen support for a simple beauty-from-within glow step.
product_reasons.liv-sugar-free: Sugar-free electrolytes for clean daily hydration without adding sugar to your routine.

routine.instruction: Nutrafol Clear Skin Nutraceutical — 4 capsules once daily with a meal.
Liquid I.V. Sugar-Free Hydration Multiplier — mix 1 stick with 500 ml water.

safety.heads_up: This routine includes beauty and supplement products that may contain animal-derived ingredients. Please review the label if you avoid gelatin, collagen, or have sensitivities to skin-support supplements.
ingredients_to_review: Nutrafol Clear Skin Nutraceutical: botanical / internal skin-support blend.
OLLY Glowing Skin: gelatin, collagen peptides.
Liquid I.V. Sugar-Free Hydration Multiplier: sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium, possible sweetener sensitivity.

bundles.name: Sleep & Stress Relief
best_for: stress affecting how I look or feel
bundles.explanation: This routine combines adaptogen support, calm-support gummies, and caffeine-free hydration to create a gentle reset ritual. Nutrafol supports the stress-adaptogen layer, OLLY adds GABA and L-theanine calm support, and Liquid I.V. gives the routine a light hydration step without stimulants.

product_reasons.nutrafol-stress-adaptogen: Adaptogen-led stress support for days when pressure affects how you look or feel.
product_reasons.olly-goodbye-stress: GABA + L-theanine for calm support during busy or mentally demanding days.
product_reasons.liv-sugar-free: Caffeine-free hydration for a lighter reset ritual, especially when you want something simple in the evening.

routine.instruction: Nutrafol Stress Adaptogen Booster — 2 capsules once daily with a meal.
Liquid I.V. Sugar-Free Hydration Multiplier — mix 1 stick with 500 ml water.

safety.heads_up: This routine includes stress-support ingredients and gummies that may not suit every dietary preference. Please check labels if you avoid gelatin or are sensitive to adaptogens, botanicals, or calming ingredients.
ingredients_to_review: Nutrafol Stress Adaptogen Booster: ashwagandha, adaptogen blend.
OLLY Goodbye Stress: gelatin, GABA, L-theanine, lemon balm.
Liquid I.V. Sugar-Free Hydration Multiplier: sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium, possible sweetener sensitivity.

bundles.name: Daily Energy & Focus
bundles.explanation: This routine combines B-vitamin support, energy gummies, and functional hydration to help structure a morning productivity habit. Nutrafol adds the energy metabolism layer, OLLY provides B12 and CoQ10 in a gummy format, and Liquid I.V. Energy supports hydration with an energy-focused drink.

product_reasons.nutrafol-b-energized: B-vitamin energy metabolism support for building a stronger morning momentum routine.
product_reasons.olly-daily-energy: B12 + CoQ10 in a gummy format for everyday energy support without adding another complex step.
product_reasons.liv-energy: Matcha + guayusa functional hydration for work, study, or early-afternoon energy.

routine.instruction: Nutrafol B-Energized Booster — 1 capsule once daily with a meal.
OLLY Extra Strength Daily Energy — 2 gummies daily.
Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Energy — mix 1 stick with 500 ml water.
No evening step — keep this routine earlier in the day.

safety.heads_up: This routine includes energy-support products. Please review before purchase if you avoid caffeine, gelatin, or stimulant-style ingredients.
ingredients_to_review: Nutrafol B-Energized Booster: B vitamins.
OLLY Extra Strength Daily Energy: gelatin, B vitamins.
Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Energy: caffeine, matcha, guayusa, electrolytes, sodium, potassium.

bundles.name: Women's Hormone Health
bundles.explanation: This routine combines hormone-transition hair support, cycle-support gummies, and hydration + immune support into one structured women’s wellbeing plan. Nutrafol supports the hormone-related hair pathway, OLLY adds chasteberry and B6 cycle support, and Liquid I.V. adds a daily hydration layer.

product_reasons.nutrafol-womens-balance: Hormone-transition hair support for life-stage related hair and wellbeing changes.
product_reasons.olly-period-hero: Chasteberry + vitamin B6 for cycle-support needs in a simple gummy format.
product_reasons.liv-immune: Electrolytes + immune-support nutrients for daily hydration during a women’s wellbeing routine.

routine.instruction: Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Immune Support — mix 1 stick with 500 ml water.
Nutrafol Women's Balance — 4 capsules once daily with a meal.

safety.heads_up: This routine is designed around cycle or hormone-related wellbeing and may include animal-derived or botanical ingredients. Please check labels carefully if you avoid collagen, gelatin, or have sensitivities related to women's health supplements.
ingredients_to_review: Nutrafol Women's Balance: marine collagen peptides, possible fish-derived collagen concern.
OLLY Period Hero: gelatin, chasteberry, vitamin B6, calcium.
Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier + Immune Support: electrolytes, vitamin C, zinc, immune-support ingredients.

quiz_rules.tie_breaker: If two or more bundles tie, choose the tied bundle that received points from Question 1.

questions.label: Question 1 — Target outcome
questions.title: What do you want your routine to help with most?
questions.subtitle: Choose the outcome that matters most for your next 4-week routine.

options.title: Feel more confident in my hair and nails
options.description: Strength, shedding, and everyday hair wellness.

options.title: Feel calmer and less mentally overloaded
options.description: Stress, calm, and a gentler daily reset.

options.title: Stay energised through work or study days
Support my body through cycle or hormone changes

questions.label: Question 2 — Main concern
questions.title: What feels most difficult to manage right now?
questions.subtitle: Choose the issue that best explains why you want support.

options.title: Keeping a consistent routine
options.description: I need structure more than a specific concern.

options.title: Skin or body feeling out of balance
Stress affecting how I look or feel
options.description: Pressure shows up in mood, skin, or hair.

options.title: More hair shedding or visible weakness
Cycle or hormone changes feeling harder to manage
I'm not sure where to start
options.description: We'll lean on your primary goal from Q1.

questions.label: Question 3 — Lifestyle
questions.title: Which lifestyle best describes you?
questions.subtitle: This helps us make the routine realistic for your day.

options.title: Desk-based work or study
options.description: Long hours sitting, working, studying, or at a screen.

options.title: Beauty & wellness focused
options.description: I build routines around skin, hair, glow, and self-care.

options.title: Active & on-the-go
options.description: I move often, exercise regularly, or stay active daily.

options.title: Busy & stressed
options.description: Full, fast-paced, or mentally demanding days.

options.title: New mum or caring routine
options.description: Caring responsibilities and limited personal time.

options.title: Cycle or life-stage focused
options.description: Cycle, hormone, or life-stage changes shape my wellbeing.

safety_rules.general_disclaimer: GlowLab can help users compare wellness routines and product information, but it does not diagnose conditions, replace professional medical advice, or guarantee outcomes.
safety_rules.always_say_for_sensitive_contexts: Please check the product label and speak to a qualified healthcare professional before using supplements, especially if you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking medication, under 18, have allergies, or are managing a medical condition.
do_not: Do not claim that a product cures or treats disease.
Do not guarantee specific hair, skin, energy, sleep, or hormone outcomes.
Do not invent ingredients, prices, product benefits, or scientific claims.
Do not tell users to stop or change medication.
Do not state that a product is safe for everyone.
allowed: Recommend from the provided GlowLab products and bundles only.
Explain why a bundle matches the user's stated goal using provided product data.
Give routine timing based on the provided morning/afternoon/evening routines.
Point out sensitivities and label checks based on the provided safety notes.
Ask a follow-up question when there is not enough information.
